content:
I'm currently just on Chapter 5 and planning on progressing more but I noticed that I've been relying a fair bit on the Emergency Gnosis to finish some fights so I wanted to get tips on building an actual team now. 

I'm interested in building an Aqueor and Ultra team (using the twins). I wanted to know who to wait for/get for Aqueor and who to add as the 4th slot in my ultra team. 

Current Aqueor team - Caecus/Goliath/Hameln/Murphy or Nautila

Current Ultra team - Pollux/Castor/Hameln/Blank

I also wanted to ask if I should still keep pulling on standard (which realm?) or use my standard pulls on WoD? If so, what WoD should I be aiming for? 

Here's my current roster. Planning to get Pollux E3 and Castor at least E1 but at best E3 (depending on luck) and possibly GMurphy but I feel like I'm missing Tulu for a team with her rn.
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan

content:
I just started plowing through the story a couple of weeks ago up to chapter 7 and now with the anniversary event I need to start figuring out a game plan. I have attached my Awakeners and WoDs. The only SSR awakeners not shown are Sanga, Tulu and Aigis. 

With some advice I've been seeing I went for Kath E3 but now I'm not sure what I should be doing. I've heard some suggest to wait for Clem or Pollux and pull for those but with GMurphy around the corner I feel like I should go for her instead? If I go that route what would my team look like? 

I currently run Caecus, Miryam, Goliath, and Ramona but with Kath now I'll prob replace Ramona with her. I'm open for any and all advice though! Ohh and I also have no idea who to pick for the By the Silver Key event!

Each unit you mentioned all do different things.

You want to play Kathi, her main team is:

Kathi / Clementine + 2 more (often tinct)

If you want to play blue, then go for gMurphy.

So up to you with what you like and want to play.

Pollux opens up another new line. But if you really love him:

Pollux / Aigis + 2 more

Thanks for that! I guess I need to understand the synergies a bit more to build a proper team. 

It sounds like Clem might be a good choice for my free SSR though. GMurphy I’ll prob grab either way since she’s the new anniversary limited and can at least fit into my current blue team more naturally
I started the game recently, I'm in Chapter 5 normal and Chapter 3 hard, I got Corpos and Gdoll first copy only. I play blue team and I am saving for GMurphy
thread_title: In what chapter is Arc 2 unlocked????Can a new player get all the 200 pulls before that deadline?

content: Arc 2 is unlocked after completing Chapter 9-12
thread_title: In what chapter is Arc 2 unlocked????Can a new player get all the 200 pulls before that deadline?

content: If you're already on Chapter 5, you might be able to do it with emergency gnosis and higher level units
